name: Red Snapper Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the first four ingredients in a large Dutch oven coated with cooking spray until tender.
2. Stir in the next seven ingredients; bring to a boil.
3. Cover and reduce heat, then simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Cut the fish into 1-inch cubes and add to the stew.
5. Cover and simmer for an additional 10 minutes or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
6. Discard the bay leaf.
7. Garnish with parsley.
Alternate fish: Pollack, sea bass, rockfish, cod, grouper.
